description: Plugin-distributed hooks for legal-small-firm. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this small-firm legal practice deliverable against the §3 house opinions (baseline on every metric, source+date on every external figure, no client PII). Set LEGAL_SMALL_FIRM_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
